trello.title: Trello Sync
trello.subtitle: Import Trello cards as tasks automatically
trello.footer_note: Auto-sync runs every <1>{{interval}} min</1>. Tasks synced from Trello will have a Trello Card ID for deduplication.

features.import_cards: Import Trello cards as Taskosaur tasks
features.map_lists: Map Trello lists to your project statuses
features.auto_sync: Auto-sync on a configurable interval (5–60 min)
features.archived: Archived cards are automatically archived here
features.per_user: Each user can connect their own Trello account

wizard.connect_subtitle: Set up your personal Trello connection
wizard.info_title: You need a personal Trello API Key and Token.
wizard.guide_step_1: Go to <1>trello.com/power-ups/admin</1> and create a Power-Up to get your API Key.
wizard.guide_step_2_intro: Generate a Token using your API Key:
wizard.get_token_btn: Click here to Authorize & Get Token
wizard.enter_key_hint: Enter your API Key above to enable the Token generation link.
wizard.api_key_hint: Your API Key can be found in the <1>Trello Power-Up Admin</1>.
wizard.encryption_hint: Credentials are stored encrypted (AES-256-GCM) — never exposed in responses.
wizard.select_board_desc: Select the Trello board to sync with this project.
wizard.mapping_desc: Map each Trello list to a Taskosaur status. Unmapped lists will use the project's default status.

messages.credential_required: Please enter both API Key and Token
messages.connected_success: Trello board connected! Running first sync...
messages.disconnect_confirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect Trello? This will stop all syncing.

workspace.title: Workspace Trello Integration
workspace.subtitle: Bulk import boards, lists, and tasks from Trello
workspace.select_boards_desc: Select the boards you want to import as new projects.
workspace.import_complete_desc: Your boards have been imported as new projects.

jira.title: Jira Sync
jira.subtitle: Import Jira issues as tasks automatically
jira.site_url_hint: The full URL from your browser. The hostname must be permitted by the server's JIRA_ALLOWED_HOSTS setting.
jira.no_projects_found: No projects found. Try checking your credentials.
jira.disconnect_modal_message: This will stop all syncing. Existing tasks will not be deleted.
jira.disconnect_workspace_modal_message: This will remove the workspace Jira connection. Project syncs already set up will continue working.
jira.interval_error_min: Sync interval must be at least 5 minutes
jira.interval_error_max: Sync interval cannot exceed 1440 minutes (24 hours)
